name: Aadiyan Dubey
bio: Founded Pnazo in 2026. Under his leadership, the company is being scaled to become India’s premier hyper-local commerce network.

name: Rajesh Khanna
bio: Managing Partner at Cyber Ventures, with extensive experience in scaling consumer internet platforms across Asia.

name: Meera Deshpande
bio: Distinguished Professor of Computer Science at IIT Bombay, specializing in distributed databases and machine learning.
